inputs.text: Mujhe sukhhi khaansi ho rahi hai, bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis

inputs.text: Main raat ko bahut pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai, aur khaansi 2 hafte se zyada ho gayi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis

inputs.text: Mujhe ab bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, khaansi mein kabhi-kabhi khoon bhi aata hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
